title: tetradenia glauca var. xanthocarpa
intro: Tetradenia glauca var. xanthocarpa, also known as yellow fruit Tetradenia, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Tetradenia glauca var. xanthocarpa include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating wounds, among others. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
